Hoa hàng dãy dãy xa tận mắt nhìn. Lòng mình TRÀN ĐẦY 🌺🌷🌻

Portrait of {subject} walking through endless rows of colorful flowers at the market, surrounded by roses, lilies, sunflowers, and orchids in every color, arms gently touching flower petals, soft early morning golden light, pure delight on face
Rose Selection
Chọn Hoa Hồng
Choosing roses when every single one is perfect is impossible 🌹😩
Chọn hoa hồng khi bông nào cũng đẹp thì không thể 🌹😩

Portrait of {subject} carefully examining roses at a flower vendor stall, holding one perfect rose close to face, surrounded by buckets of various colored roses, warm golden morning light, thoughtful appreciative expression, vendor arranging flowers in background
Bouquet Building
Kết Bó Hoa
The aunty showed me how to arrange a bouquet and now I feel like an artist 💐✨
Cô bán hoa chỉ mình cách kết bó hoa và giờ mình thấy mình như nghệ sĩ 💐✨

Portrait of {subject} standing at a flower stall learning to arrange a bouquet from an experienced vendor, hands holding various stems, colorful mixed flowers, warm morning sunlight streaming through market, focused learning expression
Lotus Moment
Khoảnh Khắc Sen
Found the lotus section. There's something sacred about these flowers 🪷🙏
Tìm được khu bán sen. Có gì đó linh thiêng trong những bông hoa này 🪷🙏

Portrait of {subject} holding a bunch of pink lotus flowers at the market, soft morning light illuminating the delicate petals, water droplets on lotus buds, gentle reverent expression, buckets of lotus flowers surrounding
Walking Home
Đi Bộ Về Nhà
Walking home with arms full of flowers at sunrise. Best morning decision ever 🌸☀️
Đi bộ về nhà tay đầy hoa lúc bình minh. Quyết định sáng tốt nhất từ trước đến giờ 🌸☀️

Portrait of {subject} walking along a quiet morning street carrying a large beautiful bouquet of mixed flowers, golden sunrise light, long shadows, flower petals slightly scattered, serene happy smile, dewdrops on flowers, peaceful morning atmosphere

title: Skatepark Session
Buổi Chiều Ở Skatepark
desc: Hitting the skatepark — learning tricks, eating concrete, and getting back up
Đến skatepark — học tricks, ăn bê tông, và đứng dậy lại
neg: blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, low quality, indoor, formal clothing
style: urban skatepark, golden afternoon light, dynamic action, street culture photography
chs: Park Arrival
Đến Skatepark
Board under arm, headphones in. It's session time 🛹🎧
Ván dưới nách, tai nghe đeo. Giờ chiến thôi 🛹🎧

Portrait of {subject} walking into a concrete skatepark carrying a skateboard under one arm, wearing casual streetwear, headphones around neck, afternoon golden light, other skaters in background, confident relaxed expression
Warm Up Cruising
Khởi Động
Cruising around the park first. Gotta feel the concrete 🛹💨
Lướt quanh park trước. Phải cảm nhận bê tông đã 🛹💨

Portrait of {subject} cruising on a skateboard through the skatepark, relaxed low stance, wind in hair, golden afternoon sunlight casting long shadows, concrete bowls and ramps in background, casual confident expression
Learning Kickflip
Học Kickflip
Attempt #47 at the kickflip. My shins hate me but we don't quit 😤🛹
Lần thứ 47 tập kickflip. Ống chân ghét mình nhưng không bỏ cuộc 😤🛹

Portrait of {subject} mid-attempt at a skateboard trick, board flipping beneath feet, determined intense expression, skatepark ramp in background, golden hour light, dynamic action pose, slight motion blur conveying movement
The Fall
Cú Ngã
Ate it HARD but got right back up. That's the skater way 💀🤣
Ngã SẤP MẶT nhưng đứng lên ngay. Đó là tinh thần skater 💀🤣

Portrait of {subject} sitting on concrete skatepark ground after a fall, laughing while brushing off, minor scrape on knee, skateboard rolled away nearby, other skaters watching, genuine tough laughter, afternoon light
Nailed It
Làm Được Rồi
FINALLY LANDED IT CLEAN. The park erupted. Best feeling ever 🛹🔥🎉
CUỐI CÙNG LAND SẠCH. Cả park hú hét. Cảm giác đỉnh nhất 🛹🔥🎉

Portrait of {subject} celebrating after landing a skateboard trick, fist pump in the air, skateboard rolling beneath feet, euphoric victorious expression, other skaters clapping in background, golden sunset light, dynamic celebratory moment
Golden Hour Chill
Chill Giờ Vàng
Session over. Sitting on the ramp watching the sunset. Sore but happy 🌅🛹
Hết buổi. Ngồi trên ramp ngắm hoàng hôn. Đau nhưng vui 🌅🛹

Portrait of {subject} sitting on the edge of a skatepark halfpipe at sunset, skateboard beside them, legs dangling, tired satisfied smile, golden sunset painting the concrete park, silhouettes of other skaters, peaceful end-of-session vibe

title: Heritage District Walk
Dạo Khu Phố Di Sản
desc: Walking through a heritage district — colonial architecture, hidden stories, and timeless charm
Dạo bước qua khu phố di sản — kiến trúc cổ, câu chuyện ẩn giấu, và nét duyên vượt thời gian
neg: blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, low quality, modern skyscrapers, rural farmland
style: warm heritage tones, colonial architecture, morning golden light, cultural street photography
chs: First Impressions
Ấn Tượng Đầu Tiên
Every building here has a story older than your grandparents 🏛️✨
Mỗi toà nhà nơi đây có câu chuyện già hơn ông bà bạn 🏛️✨

Portrait of {subject} standing on a heritage district street looking up at beautiful colonial-era architecture, ornate facades and shuttered windows, warm morning light on old buildings, curious admiring expression, cobblestone street
Hidden Alley
Hẻm Ẩn
Turned into a random alley and found THIS. The best discoveries are unplanned 📸🧡
Rẽ vào hẻm bất kỳ và tìm thấy ĐÂY. Khám phá đẹp nhất là không plan trước 📸🧡

Portrait of {subject} standing in a charming narrow heritage alley, colorful old doors and weathered walls on both sides, vintage lanterns hanging, vines growing on walls, dappled light, delighted surprised expression at the hidden beauty
Café in History
Cà Phê Trong Lịch Sử
Having coffee in a 100-year-old building. The walls have seen things 🏚️☕
Uống cà phê trong toà nhà 100 tuổi. Những bức tường đã chứng kiến nhiều thứ 🏚️☕

Portrait of {subject} sitting at a small table in a heritage café inside an old colonial building, high ceilings with antique fans, vintage wooden furniture, large arched windows, warm filtered light, contemplative expression holding coffee cup
Temple Discovery
Khám Phá Đền Cổ
Found an ancient temple hidden between modern shops. Time stands still here 🏯🕰️
Phát hiện đền cổ ẩn giữa các cửa hàng hiện đại. Thời gian ngừng trôi nơi đây 🏯🕰️

Portrait of {subject} at the entrance of a small ancient temple squeezed between heritage shophouses, incense smoke curling, ornate carved doorway, warm golden light from inside, respectful curious expression, contrast of old temple and surrounding shops
Street Art Meets History
Nghệ Thuật Gặp Lịch Sử
When street art meets heritage walls. Old and new living together perfectly 🎨🏛️
Khi street art gặp tường di sản. Cũ và mới sống chung hoàn hảo 🎨🏛️

Portrait of {subject} standing in front of a large colorful mural painted on a heritage building wall, vibrant street art contrasting with weathered old architecture, fascinated expression, warm afternoon light, cultural blend of old and new
Golden Hour Heritage
Di Sản Giờ Vàng
Heritage district at golden hour is a whole different world. Coming back again for sure 🌅🏛️
Khu phố di sản lúc golden hour là thế giới khác. Chắc chắn sẽ quay lại 🌅🏛️

Portrait of {subject} walking along a heritage district street at golden sunset, long shadows on cobblestones, warm orange light illuminating old building facades, peaceful grateful expression, vintage street lamps beginning to glow, timeless atmosphere
